overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from an urban industrial street through an abandoned construction site into a desert landscape with red rock formations. The scene transitions from paved city sidewalks to sandy desert terrain with derelict building frames and construction cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban industrial sidewalk with overhead traffic signals

events.description: passes underneath large curved traffic light gantry spanning the road
red sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk between a concrete retaining wall and industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street, moving away from camera

entered.detail: large curved metal structure with traffic lights spanning across the road
tall concrete wall with metal railing on top, graffiti visible on surface
tall damaged industrial building with exposed framework and broken windows
geometric modern building with triangular facade visible in the distance
yellow tower cranes visible above the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an urban industrial sidewalk with a large traffic light gantry overhead. The camera walks forward past the gantry, with a concrete retaining wall on the left and a damaged industrial building on the right. A red sports car passes by on the street as the camera continues walking toward a distant modern building.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching construction zone and overpass

events.description: industrial building on right gives way to open view of yellow commercial building

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the sidewalk as the urban landscape opens up ahead

entered.detail: multi-story yellow and orange building with grid windows
elevated highway or monorail track visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera moves past the industrial building, revealing a wider urban street with a yellow commercial building on the right. Construction cranes become more prominent on the left, and an overpass structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned construction site at city edge transitioning to desert

events.description: paved sidewalk ends and transitions to dirt and sand terrain
red rock desert formations become visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking off the paved path into the abandoned construction area, veering slightly left toward the desert terrain

entered.detail: derelict multi-level concrete parking structure or building frame with exposed beams
large red sandstone rock formations and desert hills
sandy dirt terrain replacing the concrete pavement

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically as the concrete sidewalk ends and gives way to sandy desert terrain. The camera moves toward an abandoned concrete structure on the right while red rock formations emerge on the left. The urban cityscape fades into a construction site wasteland at the edge of the desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert construction site with abandoned building frame

agents.ego_description: walking through the sandy desert area alongside the abandoned concrete structure, observing the construction debris

entered.detail: piles of rubble and construction materials at the base of the abandoned structure
sparse dry bushes and desert plants scattered on the sand

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through a desert landscape alongside a derelict concrete construction structure. Red rock formations rise in the distance to the left while the abandoned building frame dominates the right side. The ground is covered in sand with sparse desert vegetation, creating an atmosphere of urban decay meeting natural desert wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through an urban industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wider city street. It begins on a concrete sidewalk, passing beneath a large traffic light gantry with a retaining wall to the left and a damaged industrial building to the right. As a red sports car streaks past on the street, the camera continues its steady advance toward a distant modern building. The scene then expands as the camera clears the industrial structure, revealing a broader thoroughfare flanked by a yellow commercial building. Finally, the perspective shifts to encompass a wider vista where construction cranes loom on the left and a large overpass structure emerges in the distance ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an urban industrial edge transforms into a desolate desert wasteland. It begins where the concrete sidewalk ends, giving way to sandy terrain as the urban cityscape fades into a construction site. As the camera advances, the environment shifts toward a derelict concrete structure on the right while red rock formations emerge and rise in the distance to the left. The scene then expands across a landscape of sand and sparse vegetation, where the abandoned building frame continues to dominate the right side. Finally, the movement settles into a vista of urban decay meeting natural wilderness under the shadow of the towering red rocks.
